subcodes.first_line: God in his wisdom has created all things. Nothing has been created without a special destiny... The greatest gift of man is universal love
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @fulfillment of true potential, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @The Holy Spirit, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
